title: Environmental risk management instruments - Canada.ca
content:
## Environmental risk management instruments
Pollution prevention planning notices, performance agreements, release guidelines, codes of practice, regulations and other instruments.

## Services and information

### Pollution prevention planning notices
List of notices, their effectiveness, how they are developed and implemented, guidance on how to report

### Environmental performance agreements
List of agreements, their effectiveness, how they are developed and implemented
List of guidelines, how they are developed and implemented

### Environmental codes of practice
List of codes, how they are developed and implemented
Current, proposed and repealed regulations

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
